description_long: This is a sleek, modern airplane with a predominantly red fuselage accented by white and black details. The aircraft features a pointed nose, a clear multi-seat cockpit canopy, and swept-back wings with prominent winglets and black-tipped edges. Twin jet engines are mounted on either side of the rear fuselage, and the tail section displays a large red vertical stabilizer with a star insignia. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable. The overall design is aerodynamic, with smooth surfaces and a streamlined profile suitable for high-speed flight.
description: A red, streamlined airplane with swept-back wings, twin rear jet engines, and a clear multi-seat cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated nose, clear cockpit canopy, swept-back wings, and prominent vertical stabilizer with a star insignia.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin jet engines, wide wingspan with winglets, and the symmetrical tail section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the cockpit, wings, and tail design.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the full width of the wings with their distinctive tips.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and prominent upward-angled winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on either side of the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single large vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
